topic: A 36-second Korean concept film for Abyssal Surge: the Dusk Warden turns a lunar fracture into a deliberate three-stage command campaign.

generation_gate.atlas_cloud_credential: not present in the current environment
generation_gate.vox_pipeline_scripts: not present in the installed Vox Director skill package
generation_gate.image_provenance: Use only approved GodTiboImagen stage-key-art inputs. Do not generate new game image resources with Atlas.
generation_gate.ownership_and_terms: must be verified by the named release owner before a billable remote request
generation_gate.fallback: Existing locally rendered, text-complete campaign cinematic remains valid if this experiment is not approved.
generation_gate.human_approval: approved by project owner on 2026-07-16; selected GTI-derived local collage composites before Atlas image-to-video generation
generation_gate.visual_production_path: Create local torn-paper/halftone collage posters from approved GodTiboImagen stage plates, then submit those posters to Atlas image-to-video; do not request Atlas text-to-image posters.

visual_direction.source_style: Original non-pixel painterly dark-fantasy concept art from approved Abyssal Surge stage plates, assembled locally into Vox-style torn-paper editorial collage posters before image-to-video generation.
visual_direction.palette: charcoal and wet obsidian ground; abyss teal for allied binding; violet for control and Domain; restrained ember gold and red for hostile pressure.
visual_direction.image_rule: No AI-baked text, logos, watermarks, UI, franchise references, anime, chibi, cartoon, retro, or pixel art. Add the Korean captions and end title as deterministic post-production overlays.
visual_direction.motion_rule: Flat 2D torn-paper layers with stable painterly source plates, rigid cut-outs, visible parallax, and no perspective warping, morphing, flashing, or tactical-state invention.

audio_direction.narration: Korean; calm, low, ceremonial field-command delivery. Place first, pressure second, imperative or consequence last. Narration must never promise a mechanic beyond the player-visible campaign rules.
audio_direction.voice_provider: unselected; must be imported with provider, model or voice, Korean source script, checksum, loudness review, and human approval.
audio_direction.music: Instrumental low strings, drowned iron percussion, distant tide resonance; no vocals; ducked beneath narration.
audio_direction.captions: Korean speech captions plus meaningful non-speech audio cues; accompany a descriptive transcript.

post_production.caption_strategy: Pillow/FFmpeg overlay, never regenerated inside an image-to-video clip.
post_production.final_contract: H.264 High, yuv420p, 960x540, 24 fps, faststart MP4; preserve a text-complete optional-cinematic fallback and respect prefers-reduced-motion.
post_production.quality_gate: Inspect source/keyframe identity, text stability, tactical truthfulness, flash safety, captions and transcript before packaging.

beats.narration: 달이 갈라진 밤, 검은 바다 위로 심연의 문이 돌아왔다.
beats.bg: charcoal black with a thin lunar-white fracture and abyss teal reflection

shots.scene: A lunar fracture opens over a drowned coastal ward; the Dusk Warden is a small, readable silhouette on wet iron, separated into rigid torn-paper foreground, midground and background layers.
shots.element_motion: The paper moon crack pulses once, narrow teal residue ripples across the black sea, small paper ash scraps drift inward, and the Warden cloak edge settles; all lettering is absent from the image.

shots.scene: A close detail of fractured moonlight reflected in drowned iron with a single teal Echo Deep seam and torn ward-map scraps.
shots.element_motion: Reflection layers slide at different speeds, halftone grain breathes softly, and one paper ward fragment pivots into alignment before settling.

beats.narration: 신더 스팬이 잠식된다. 재의 메아리를 사냥해, 남은 영혼을 추출하라.
beats.bg: soot charcoal, ember-red pressure, and restrained abyss teal

shots.scene: The suspended Cinder Span crosses a drowned forge. Ash spoor leads to one defeated Echo and a clearly separate soul pool; a damaged relay waits beyond.
shots.element_motion: A teal spoor line glides toward the pool, ash scraps drift above the bridge, a paper chain swings once, and the soul-pool glow rises and settles without becoming a UI effect.

shots.scene: Close cut-in: one black-teal soul pool lifting through an iron ward, with two torn ember scraps framing the process.
shots.element_motion: The pool rises as one rigid paper ribbon, the iron ward ring hinges open, teal fibers pulse once, and the surrounding scraps slide apart and settle.

beats.narration: 신더 스팬에서 영혼을 군단으로 세워, 단 하나의 노드를 점거하라.
beats.bg: wet obsidian with allied abyss teal and a single ember relay

shots.scene: Two shade forms coalesce from one soul knot beneath the Cinder Span, their silhouettes hard and readable against rain-dark iron.
shots.element_motion: Two rigid shade cut-outs rise in sequence, teal ribbon fragments spiral once around the soul knot, paper rain streaks pass downward, and the forms lock into a line.

shots.scene: A single damaged forge node becomes a controlled teal anchor while the formed legion stands on the bridge; no victory cue and no extra node are shown.
shots.element_motion: The teal control ring expands once and settles, the banner straightens, tiny coal scraps scatter away, and the legion layers hold position with subtle depth parallax.

beats.narration: 베일 시타델, 한 신호를 점거해 수호자를 빙의하라. 두 신호면 총공격이다.
beats.bg: desaturated teal and indigo with exact violet command-thread accents

shots.scene: Veil Citadel moves through rain-dark void between exactly two separate signal beacons. A stone sentinel silhouette remains clearly empty and non-human.
shots.element_motion: The two beacon layers pulse in alternating violet light, citadel paper layers drift in depth, rain strips fall, and small ward geometry slides into a two-point alignment.

shots.scene: A violet command thread enters the helm of an empty stone sentinel while two distant beacon reflections remain visible in its mask.
shots.element_motion: The thread draws one clean line into the helm, mask reflections brighten then settle, paper rune fragments orbit once as rigid cut-outs, and the sentinel never changes into a human body.

beats.narration: 메아리 왕좌에서 군주의 영역은 단 한 번, 진격을 지키는 방패가 된다.
beats.bg: royal violet, cold blue, and a thin dawnless-gold threshold

shots.scene: The Echo Throne node stands before a gate above the last remembered sea. A thin violet Domain arc covers the legion, visibly finite and temporary.
shots.element_motion: The violet paper dome expands to one limited radius, the black-water layers ripple, small gold ward motes travel along the arc, and the dome fades toward a stable edge.

shots.scene: Close detail of a crowned seal at the base of a fading violet Domain arc, with the gate still unresolved beyond it.
shots.element_motion: The seal rotates as a rigid paper disc, violet fragments travel outward then disappear, paper shadow shifts softly, and the distant gate remains closed.

beats.narration: 게이트 소버린에게 총공격하라. 심연은 당신의 명령을 기다린다.
beats.bg: black sea, cold blue, and restrained dawnless gold

shots.scene: A coordinated teal-and-ember strike line advances against the Gate Sovereign's broken arch over black water. The gate breaks but the sea remains restrained; no explosion, logo, or false permanent victory state.
shots.element_motion: Rigid legion layers advance, the broken gate arch separates into three paper fragments, teal and ember scraps cross once, and the black-water reflection pulls downward to a still end state.

shots.scene: Quiet return to a black-water shrine: one legion standard reflects in a resealed gate while the Dusk Warden remains a small silhouette. The image contains no readable title; the title is a post-production overlay.
shots.element_motion: The standard cloth flutters once, the reflection settles, a few torn paper scraps drift out of frame, and all layers hold still for the hard-cut payoff.
